inputs.label: Curb Length (per piece)
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single concrete curb section

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single concrete curb section
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir beton bordür bölümünün uzunluğu
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'une section de bordure en béton
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de una sección individual de bordillo de hormigón

businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la section transversale de la bordure
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la sección transversal del bordillo

businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de la section transversale de la bordure
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de la sección transversal del bordillo

inputs.label: Number of Curbs
inputs.businessContext: Total count of curb pieces to produce or install

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of curb pieces to produce or install
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilecek veya monte edilecek toplam bordür parçası sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der herzustellenden oder zu installierenden Bordsteine
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de pièces de bordure à produire ou installer
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad total de piezas de bordillo a producir o instalar
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد قطع الحواف المراد إنتاجها أو تركيبها

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allowance for material loss, spillage, or over-excavation

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage allowance for material loss, spillage, or over-excavation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme kaybı, dökülme veya aşırı kazı için yüzde payı
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Zuschlag für Materialverlust, Verschütten oder Überaushub
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de tolérance pour perte de matière, déversement ou sur-excavation
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de tolerancia por pérdida de material, derrame o sobreexcavación
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة السماح لفقدان المواد أو الانسكاب أو الحفر الزائد

formulas.totalWeightKg: curbLength * curbWidth * curbHeight * curbCount * (1 + wasteFactor / 100) * concreteDensity
formulas.totalWeightTon: curbLength * curbWidth * curbHeight * curbCount * (1 + wasteFactor / 100) * concreteDensity / 1000

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
